name: Stickman Stack Race
description: Lead your stickman crowd, crush obstacles, and dominate the streets in Stickman Stack Race! Choose the right gates, gather warriors, and multiply your team to beat rival crowds. Collect coins, upgrade your stickmen, and race through crowded city streets toward the ultimate battle. Face the King-stickman in the final clash and claim the castle! With bright 3D graphics, simple controls, and addictive stacking action, Stickman Stack Race offers endless fun, strategy, and thrills. Become the ultimate crowd master and rule the race!
